infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Saarthi AI needs your location to detect nearby fatigued drivers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Saarthi AI tracks location in the background to keep the DangerBubble geo-index updated.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Saarthi AI records a 10-second voice sample to check your alertness during drives.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Saarthi AI tracks your location to protect nearby drivers via DangerBubble.

plugins.microphonePermission: Saarthi AI records a 10-second voice sample during check-ins to detect fatigue.
